blended.narrative: Hoodoo is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,247 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 3.8" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 5".
